title: Jesus Wants All Of His Children

c_lines: Words: verses 1-5 Mrs. James W. Wood, 1909. verses 6-7 Brian J. Dumont, 2008.
Music and Setting: 'Blessed Are They' Mrs. James W. Wood, from "Service in Song", Standard Pub. Co., 1909.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2006 Revision.
verses 6-7 released into the public domain by the author on 17 Dec 2008.

1.raw_text: Jesus wants all of His children to be good and true; He will help if we but ask Him, help us gladly too.

2.raw_text: Jesus was so meek and lowly, As a little child. We will try to be like Jesus, gentle, patient, mild.

3.raw_text: Jesus wants us to be loving, helping when we may. We will try to be kindhearted, merciful each day.

4.raw_text: "Blessed are the pure in heart," thus the Savior taught. Clean in mind, in soul, in body, pure in every thought.

5.raw_text: When we find our friends are angry, we will to them say, "Jesus wants you to be loving, each and every day."
